allow: Bash(keytool -genkey -v -keystore evlumba-release.jks -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -alias evlumba -dname "CN=Evlumba App, OU=Evlumba, O=Evlumba, L=Istanbul, S=Istanbul, C=TR" -storepass evlumba2025 -keypass evlumba2025)

Bash("/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home/bin/keytool" -genkey -v -keystore evlumba-release.jks -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -alias evlumba -dname "CN=Evlumba App, OU=Evlumba, O=Evlumba, L=Istanbul, S=Istanbul, C=TR" -storepass evlumba2025 -keypass evlumba2025)
